w:r.w:t: With Antigravity IDE Prompts — Athlete · Institution · Parent/Spectator
Assigned Developer: Thando | IDE: Antigravity | Stack: React 18 + TypeScript + Supabase | March 2026

This document is Thando's step-by-step execution guide for building the three sign-up/sign-in user flows on evenplayground.com. It is structured to be used directly alongside Antigravity IDE: each section contains ready-to-paste prompts that generate the specific code needed at that step.
Work through the document in order — Analysis first, then Database, then each user type. Each user type (Athlete, Institution, Parent/Spectator) is self-contained and colour-coded:
Sport profile, stats, position, physical data, media highlights
School/club admin, team management, coach accounts, SASA/SAFA affiliation
Child linking, match watching, progress reports, community membership

Each Antigravity IDE prompt is boxed in dark blue. Copy the entire prompt text and paste it into the IDE chat window. The prompt is pre-engineered to produce working TypeScript/React/Supabase code compatible with the existing stack.
Before building, Thando must understand exactly what already exists so no working code is duplicated or broken. The following is a confirmed inventory of the current signup system.
Supabase SQL: creates row in profiles table on auth.users insert
Supabase DB — id, email, role, full_name, bio, avatar_url, created_at
Extend with new fields listed in Section 3.
Supabase DB — id, user_id FK, primary_sport, position
Extend with additional fields in Section 3.
Supabase DB — id, user_id FK, institution_name, city
Extend steps, do not rewrite from scratch.
Active on profiles, athletes, institutions, match_stats
Apply same pattern to new tables.
2.2 Identified Gaps in Current Signup Flow
Fan role exists in DB but SignupWizard has no parent-specific flow, no child-linking step, no subscription tier prompt.
Squad, nationality, DOB, height, weight, BMI, MYSAFA ID, FIFA ID, position abbreviation are not collected at signup or in a post-signup completion step.
No distinction between school admin, club admin, individual coach, or federation. One generic institution type collects all.
Platform processes minors' personal data. No consent checkbox, consent timestamp, or consent version recorded at signup.
Users may access the wizard before verifying their email address.
Signup completes with no prompt to choose a paid tier (Community Builder, Player Profile). Revenue is left uncollected.
Google and Facebook login not configured in Supabase or surfaced in the UI.
Run these Supabase migrations before touching any frontend code. All migrations are additive (no existing columns are dropped). Apply them in the Supabase SQL Editor or via the Supabase CLI.
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — DB MIGRATIONS — All Three User Types
You are a Supabase SQL expert working on a React 18 + TypeScript + Supabase project
called Even Playground (evenplayground.com). The existing tables are:
profiles (id uuid PK, email text, role text, full_name text, bio text, avatar_url text, created_at timestamptz)
athletes (id uuid PK, user_id uuid FK -> profiles.id, primary_sport text, position text)
institutions (id uuid PK, user_id uuid FK -> profiles.id, institution_name text, city text)
Generate a single migration file with these changes:
id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
user_id uuid UNIQUE NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
parent_user_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
athlete_user_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
6. For each new table, write Row Level Security policies following this pattern:
7. Create an index on profiles(subscription_tier) and profiles(subscription_active).
Output: a single valid PostgreSQL migration file with clear section comments.
Do not use any Supabase-specific syntax — plain SQL only.
squad, position_abbreviation, nationality, DOB, height_cm, weight_kg, mysafa_id, fifa_id, playing_style, profile_slug
institution_type, sport_codes, safa_affiliation_number, province, contact_phone, website_url
Links parent to their child athlete account.
These components are shared by all three user types. Build them once before working on role-specific flows. They form the shell that each role-specific wizard step plugs into.
4.1 Prompt: Shared Auth Page (Sign In + Sign Up Entry)
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — SHARED AUTH — AuthPage.tsx
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn-ui, Supabase Auth.
Build a production-quality AuthPage component that:
- Email + password fields with real-time validation (zod schema)
- Show/hide password toggle button (Eye / EyeOff icon from lucide-react)
- Google OAuth button using supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({ provider: 'google' })
- Facebook OAuth button using supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({ provider: 'facebook' })
- On success: redirect to /dashboard/[role] using role from profiles table
- On error: display Supabase error message in a shadcn Alert destructive variant
- Email + password fields (password min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number)
- Confirm password field with match validation
- Role selector: three large card buttons (Athlete, Institution, Parent/Spectator)
Each card has an icon (User, Building2, Eye from lucide-react), a title, and a one-line description
- POPIA consent checkbox: 'I consent to Even Playground collecting and processing my
personal data in accordance with South Africa's POPIA. [Read policy]'
The checkbox is required. Unchecked state blocks form submission.
- On submit: call supabase.auth.signUp with email and password.
Pass { role, popia_consent: true, popia_consent_date: new Date().toISOString() }
as user metadata so the handle_new_user trigger can use it.
- After signup success, redirect to /auth/verify-email page (not the dashboard yet).
- Use shadcn Tabs for Sign In / Sign Up toggle
- Use React Hook Form with zod resolver for all validation
- Use @tanstack/react-query useMutation for async auth calls
- All loading states must show a shadcn Spinner inside the submit button
- The page must be fully responsive (mobile-first)
- Export the component as default. File: src/pages/auth/AuthPage.tsx
- Do not use any <form> HTML element. Use shadcn Form component.
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — SHARED AUTH — VerifyEmailPage.tsx
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn-ui, Supabase.
- Display a friendly 'Check your inbox' message with a mail icon (lucide-react Mail)
- Show the user's email address (retrieved from supabase.auth.getUser())
- 'Resend verification email' button — calls supabase.auth.resend({ type: 'signup', email })
Disable the button for 60 seconds after clicking with a countdown timer
- On Supabase auth state change event 'SIGNED_IN' with email_confirmed_at set,
- If user is already confirmed when they land on this page, redirect immediately to
- 'Wrong email? Sign out' link — calls supabase.auth.signOut then goes to /auth
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — SHARED AUTH — SignupWizard router extension
Project: Even Playground. Existing file: src/components/auth/SignupWizard.tsx
The current wizard has 3 steps for athlete and institution roles.
Extend it to support a 4-step flow for ALL roles including a new 'parent' role.
Do not break existing athlete or institution steps.
Step 1 — Role confirmation (already exists, add 'parent' card)
Step 2 — Basic info: full_name, bio, avatar upload (already exists)
Step 3 — Role-specific data (see separate prompts per role below)
Step 4 — Subscription tier selection (new step for all roles)
Card A: 'Community Builder' — R49.99/month — 'View fixtures, results & social feed'
Card B: 'Player Profile' — R99.99 first month, then R299.99/month — 'Full profile + stats + Digital CV'
Show this card only if role === 'athlete'
Card C: 'Continue for free' — R0 — 'Limited access. Upgrade any time.'
- On selecting a paid tier, redirect to /checkout/[tier] after wizard completion
- On selecting free, redirect directly to /dashboard/[role]
- Store chosen tier in Supabase: upsert profiles set subscription_tier = chosenTier
Also add a progress bar at the top of the wizard showing Step X of 4.
Use shadcn Progress component for this.
Preserve all existing wizard logic. Only add to it.
All athlete-specific fields are collected across Steps 2 and 3 of the wizard, plus a post-onboarding profile completion nudge. Fields marked REQUIRED block wizard progression if empty.
Must be in the past. Under-18 triggers parent-link prompt.
Auto-generated from full_name. Unique. Editable in profile settings.
Image upload. Max 5MB. JPG/PNG/WEBP. Stored in Supabase Storage.
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn-ui, React Hook Form + zod.
This is Step 3 of the signup wizard for athletes only (role === 'athlete').
It is rendered inside the existing SignupWizard component.
Props: { onNext: () => void, onBack: () => void, userId: string }
On change: update the Position dropdown options based on sport (see mapping below)
2. Position — shadcn Select dropdown (dynamic based on sport):
Football positions: ['Goalkeeper','Right Back','Left Back','Centre Back','Defensive Mid','Central Mid',
All other sports: text input field (free text)
3. Position Abbreviation — shadcn Input, max 5 chars, auto-uppercase on input.
For Football auto-fill from a lookup: GK -> GK, Striker -> ST, etc.
4. Squad / Team Name — shadcn Input, placeholder 'e.g. Wits University U13 GDL'
5. Date of Birth — shadcn DatePicker (calendar picker).
Validation: date must be in the past.
If age < 18: show a yellow Alert banner:
'As a minor, a parent or guardian will need to link their account to yours.
You will receive a 6-digit linking code after completing setup.'
6. Nationality — shadcn Select with full country list (use a country-list npm package or
hardcode the 10 most common South African nationalities + 'Other')
7. Height (cm) — shadcn Input type='number', min=50, max=250, step=0.1
8. Weight (kg) — shadcn Input type='number', min=20, max=200, step=0.1
Below these two inputs, show a read-only computed BMI display:
- Validate all required fields with zod
- Generate profile_slug from full_name: lowercase, replace spaces with hyphens, append random 4-digit suffix
- Upsert into athletes table: { user_id, primary_sport, position, position_abbreviation, squad,
- If athlete is a minor (age < 18): generate a 6-digit numeric verification_code,
insert into parent_athlete_links: { athlete_user_id: userId, verified: false, verification_code }
- Show a shadcn Alert destructive if Supabase upsert fails
- Show inline field errors from zod
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — ATHLETE — Post-login redirect hook
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Supabase, react-router-dom.
This hook is called after a successful supabase.auth.signInWithPassword or OAuth login.
It fetches the user's profile from the profiles table and redirects to the correct page.
1. Fetch: SELECT role, subscription_tier, subscription_active FROM profiles WHERE id = auth.uid()
2. If profile does not exist yet (new OAuth user): redirect to /onboarding/wizard
- If athlete row exists AND primary_sport is set: redirect to /dashboard/athlete
- If institution row exists AND institution_name is set: redirect to /dashboard/institution
- If parent row exists: redirect to /dashboard/parent
Export hook. Also export a useAuthStateListener component that wraps the app in an
onAuthStateChange listener calling this hook on every SIGNED_IN event.
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — ATHLETE — AthleteDashboard shell with profile completeness
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn-ui, Supabase.
Extend the existing athlete dashboard to add a Profile Completeness Banner at the top.
- Fetch athlete row for current user
- Calculate completion percentage based on these fields being non-null:
mysafa_id (5%), fifa_id (5%), playing_style (5%), at least 1 match_stat (5%)
Show a teal banner with a shadcn Progress bar showing the percentage
Show the top 3 missing fields as quick-action buttons: 'Add [field name]'
- If completion === 100%: show a green 'Profile Complete' badge instead
Also add a 'Share Profile' button to the dashboard header that:
- Shows a toast: 'Profile link copied to clipboard!'
Do not break any existing dashboard functionality.
SA mobile format: 0XX XXX XXXX or +27
Alphanumeric max 30. Show only for football sport codes.
Alphanumeric max 30. Show only for swimming.
Image upload. Max 5MB. JPG/PNG. Square preferred.
Select: School Admin | Club Admin | Head Coach | Federation Admin
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn-ui, React Hook Form + zod, Supabase.
Props: { onNext: () => void, onBack: () => void, userId: string }
1. Institution Type — shadcn RadioGroup with 4 large styled cards:
Each card has an icon (GraduationCap | Trophy | Award | Star from lucide-react)
and a one-line description underneath the label.
School: 'e.g. Wits University', Club: 'e.g. Mamelodi Sundowns FC',
Federation: 'e.g. SAFA Gauteng', Academy: 'e.g. Supersport Academy'
4. City — shadcn Input (existing field, keep it here)
6. Sport Codes — shadcn multi-select checkboxes in a grid (3 columns):
Options: Football | Rugby | Cricket | Basketball | Netball | Hockey | Athletics | Tennis | Swimming | Other
If 'Football' is checked: show SAFA Affiliation Number input
If 'Swimming' is checked: show SASA Registration Number input
7. Website URL — shadcn Input, optional, url format validation
This is stored only in the wizard session — it does NOT go to DB directly.
It drives what sub-role coach features are shown post-onboarding.
- Validate with zod. Required: institution_type, institution_name, province, city, contact_phone, sport_codes (min 1)
- Upsert into institutions table: all collected fields
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — INSTITUTION — InstitutionDashboard onboarding checklist
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn-ui, Supabase.
Add an Onboarding Checklist panel to the existing institution dashboard.
This panel is shown only when checklist_complete is false on the institution record.
Checklist items (each toggles green with a checkmark when done):
[ ] Institution profile complete (institution_name, city, province, sport_codes all set)
[ ] At least 1 team / squad created (future: teams table — for now just a link to /dashboard/institution/teams)
[ ] At least 1 player profile added or invited
Fetch completion status by checking the institutions table and related tables.
Show a large orange CTA button 'Complete Setup' that scrolls to the first incomplete item.
When all items are checked, animate the panel to a green 'Setup Complete' banner and set
checklist_complete = true on the institutions record.
Do not break existing dashboard functionality.
6-digit code issued to the child athlete. Used to link accounts.
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn-ui, React Hook Form + zod, Supabase.
Props: { onNext: () => void, onBack: () => void, userId: string }
STEP 3 for the parent/spectator role has two different paths:
Path A: 'I am here to track my child'
Path B: 'I am a sports fan / spectator'
SHOW FIRST: a mode selection with two large cards:
Card A: Parent Mode icon=Users label='Track my child athlete' description='Link to your child account to view their stats, reports, and match schedules.'
Card B: Fan Mode icon=Eye label='Sports fan / spectator' description='Follow your favourite teams, watch matches, and join the community.'
Field 1: Contact Phone — shadcn Input (SA phone format validation)
Field 3: 6-digit linking code — shadcn OTP input (6 boxes).
Label: 'Enter the linking code your child received at the end of their signup.'
On entering 6 digits: call a Supabase RPC function 'verify_parent_link_code'
that checks parent_athlete_links where verification_code matches and verified = false.
If match found: show the athlete's name in a green success card: 'Linked to [Name]!'
If not found: show red error 'Code not found. Ask your child to check their dashboard for their code.'
Add a 'My child has not signed up yet — Skip for now' text link that skips this field.
- Insert into parents table: { user_id, contact_phone, relationship_to_child }
- If link code was verified: update parent_athlete_links SET verified = true, linked_at = now()
Field 1: Contact Phone — optional in fan mode
Field 2: Favourite Sports — multi-select checkboxes (same sport list as institution flow)
Field 3: City / Region — shadcn Input so we can show them local content
- Insert into parents table: { user_id, contact_phone: null, relationship_to_child: 'fan' }
- Update profiles: SET bio = 'Sports fan from [city]' if bio is null
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn-ui, Supabase.
This dashboard has two modes based on whether the parent has linked children:
Fetch linked athlete profiles from parent_athlete_links JOIN profiles JOIN athletes.
For each linked child show a 'Child Card' containing:
- Three quick-action buttons: 'View Profile', 'View Stats', 'Upcoming Fixtures'
- A small badge showing the most recent match result
Below child cards, show a 'Recent Activity' feed filtered to the child's team:
- Last 3 match results (from match_stats + fixtures tables)
Show an empty state with a large purple illustration placeholder,
heading 'Link your child athlete', and a button 'Enter linking code' that
opens a shadcn Dialog with the same 6-digit OTP input from the wizard.
Navigation items: Home | My Children | Fixtures | Live Feed | Account
Use the same shadcn sidebar pattern as the athlete dashboard.
Create a custom hook src/hooks/useLinkedAthletes.ts that:
- Queries parent_athlete_links WHERE parent_user_id = auth.uid() AND verified = true
- Joins profiles and athletes on athlete_user_id
Export ParentDashboard as default. Export useLinkedAthletes from hooks file.
All three flows use zod for form validation. Generate the full zod schema library once and import it into each wizard step. This ensures consistent rules across the entire app.
Project: Even Playground. Stack: TypeScript + zod.
Create src/lib/validationSchemas.ts with the following exported zod schemas:
email: z.string().email('Please enter a valid email address'),
.regex(/[A-Z]/, 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter')
.regex(/[0-9]/, 'Password must contain at least one number'),
date_of_birth: z.date({ required_error: 'Date of birth is required' })
.refine(d => d < new Date(), 'Date of birth must be in the past'),
.regex(/^(0|\+27)[6-8][0-9]{8}$/, 'Please enter a valid South African phone number'),
sport_codes: z.array(z.string()).min(1, 'Please select at least one sport'),
Import zod at the top: import { z } from 'zod'
Do not export anything that is not listed above.
After building all components, the router must be updated to register all new routes and enforce authentication and role-based access control.
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — ROUTING — App.tsx route updates
Project: Even Playground. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, react-router-dom v6, Supabase.
Existing file: src/App.tsx (or src/router/index.tsx — check project)
Add these routes to the router. Do not remove any existing routes.
/auth/reset-password -> PasswordResetPage (generate this: single field new password form)
PROTECTED ROUTES — require auth.user to exist, email_confirmed_at to be non-null:
ROLE-PROTECTED ROUTES — require auth + correct role in profiles.role:
- If no Supabase session: redirect to /auth
- If email not confirmed: redirect to /auth/verify-email
- If profile.role not in allowedRoles: redirect to /dashboard/[profile.role]
Wrap all dashboard routes with ProtectedRoute.
The wizard route needs only the base auth check (no role restriction — any logged-in user can use it).
Add a catch-all route /* -> redirect to /auth if not logged in, or /dashboard/[role] if logged in.
After each sprint, Thando must verify the following test cases. Use Playwright for E2E and Vitest for unit tests. The IDE prompt below generates the test file.
10.1 Manual Test Cases by User Type
Submit button disabled or form shows inline zod error. No Supabase call made.
Email field shows 'Please enter a valid email address' before submission.
'Passwords do not match' error on confirmPassword field.
Submit button is disabled. Cannot proceed without consent.
After signup, user lands on VerifyEmailPage. Visiting /dashboard redirects back to /auth/verify-email.
Button is disabled for 60 seconds after click. Countdown displays.
Entering a DOB that makes age < 18 shows yellow minor alert banner.
Entering height and weight auto-computes BMI and shows correct colour badge.
Selecting Football shows football positions. Selecting Rugby shows rugby positions.
After wizard, visiting evenplayground.com/player/[slug] shows the profile page.
Clicking 'Share Profile' copies the URL to clipboard and shows toast confirmation.
SAFA field only visible when Football is checked in sport_codes.
New institution dashboard shows the checklist panel. Items check off as data is added.
Entering a wrong 6-digit code shows 'Code not found' error. No crash.
Entering the correct code shows the child athlete's name in a green card.
Selecting fan mode skips child-linking fields and proceeds to step 4.
Parent dashboard shows empty state with 'Enter linking code' CTA.
Any /dashboard/* URL while logged out redirects to /auth.
10.2 Prompt: Generate Playwright E2E Test Suite
ANTIGRAVITY IDE PROMPT — TESTING — auth.spec.ts Playwright E2E
Project: Even Playground. Stack: Playwright, TypeScript.
Existing config: playwright.config.ts (already configured in project)
Write Playwright tests for the following flows. Use test.describe blocks per flow.
Use Page Object Model: create a src/tests/pages/AuthPage.ts helper class with
locators for all form fields and actions.
test('shows minor alert when DOB makes age < 18')
test('calculates BMI correctly on height/weight input')
test('completes full wizard and lands on athlete dashboard')
test('profile URL is accessible after signup')
test('shows SAFA field only when Football is selected')
test('completes full wizard and lands on institution dashboard')
test('onboarding checklist appears after first login')
test('fan mode skips child linking step')
test('wrong linking code shows error, not crash')
test('correct linking code shows child name in green card')
test('completes full wizard and lands on parent dashboard')
Use environment variables for test user credentials: process.env.TEST_ATHLETE_EMAIL etc.
Use beforeEach to clear auth state. Use afterEach to clean up test records via Supabase admin client.
Work through these tasks in order. Each day maps to a specific IDE prompt from this document. Estimated total: 8 working days.
Run database migration (Section 3). Verify all new columns and tables in Supabase studio.
Build AuthPage.tsx: sign in, sign up, role selector, POPIA consent, OAuth buttons.
Build VerifyEmailPage.tsx. Extend SignupWizard with Step 4 (subscription tier) and progress bar.
Build WizardStep3Athlete.tsx. All sport/position fields, DOB minor detection, BMI calculator.
Build WizardStep3Institution.tsx. Institution type cards, province, sport codes, conditional SAFA field.
Build WizardStep3Parent.tsx. Parent/fan mode split, 6-digit linking code OTP, fan sport preferences.
Update App.tsx routing. Build ProtectedRoute. Build usePostLoginRedirect hook. Build ParentDashboard shell.
Generate and run Playwright E2E tests. Fix failing cases. Deploy to staging. QA sign-off.
Even Playground Development | evenplayground.com | Execution Plan for Thando | March 2026
All prompts and specifications are internal and confidential. Copyright Even Playground Development 2026.
